+- KotlinFile[]
   +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   +- PackageHeader[]
   |  +- T-PACKAGE[@Text = "package"]
   |  +- Identifier[@Identifier = "net"]
   |  |  +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |  |  +- T-Identifier[@Text = "net"]

   |  |           |  |                                                     |     |  |                                                           +- Conjunction[]

   |  |           |  |                                                     |     +- T-RCURL[@Text = "}"]
   |  |           |  |                                                     +- T-ELSE[@Text = "else"]
   |  |           |  |                                                     +- ControlStructureBody[]
   |  |           |  |                                                        +- Block[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           +- T-LCURL[@Text = "{"]
   |  |           |  |                                                           +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   |  |           |  |                                                           +- Statements[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  +- Statement[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |  +- Expression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |     +- Disjunction[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |        +- Conjunction[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |           +- Equality[]

   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                          +- InfixFunctionCall[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                             +- RangeExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                +- AdditiveExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                   +- MultiplicativeExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                      +- AsExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                         +- PrefixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                            +- PostfixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                               +- PrimaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                  +- JumpExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                     +- T-RETURN[@Text = "return"]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                     +- Expression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        +- Disjunction[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           +- Conjunction[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                              +- Equality[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                                 +- Comparison[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                                    +- GenericCallLikeComparison[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                                       +- InfixOperation[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                                          +- ElvisExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                                             +- InfixFunctionCall[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                                                +- RangeExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                                                   +- AdditiveExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                                                      +- MultiplicativeExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                                                         +- AsExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                                                            +- PrefixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                                                               +- PostfixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                                                                  +- PrimaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                                                                     +- LiteralConstant[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                                                                        +- T-BooleanLiteral[@Text = "false"]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  +- Semis[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |     +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   |  |           |  |                                                           +- T-RCURL[@Text = "}"]
   |  |           |  +- Semis[]
   |  |           |     +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   |  |           +- T-RCURL[@Text = "}"]
   |  +- Semis[]
   |     +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]

   |     +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]

   |  +- Declaration[]
   |  |  +- FunctionDeclaration[@Identifier = "isEqual", @ReturnTypeName = "kotlin.Boolean"]
   |  |     +- T-FUN[@Text = "fun"]
   |  |     +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |     |  +- T-Identifier[@Text = "isEqual"]

   |  |     |  +- FunctionValueParameter[@TypeName = "kotlin.Int"]
   |  |     |  |  +- Parameter[@Identifier = "x"]
   |  |     |  |     +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |     |  |     |  +- T-Identifier[@Text = "x"]

   |  |     |  |        +- TypeReference[]
   |  |     |  |           +- UserType[]

   |  |     |  |                 +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |     |  |                    +- T-Identifier[@Text = "Int"]
   |  |     |  +- T-COMMA[@Text = ","]
   |  |     |  +- FunctionValueParameter[@TypeName = "kotlin.Int"]

   |  |                                                           +- WhenEntry[]
   |  |                                                           |  +- WhenCondition[]
   |  |                                                           |  |  +- Expression[]
   |  |                                                           |  |     +- Disjunction[]
   |  |                                                           |  |        +- Conjunction[]
   |  |                                                           |  |           +- Equality[]
   |  |                                                           |  |              +- Comparison[]
   |  |                                                           |  |              |  +- GenericCallLikeComparison[]
   |  |                                                           |  |              |     +- InfixOperation[]
   |  |                                                           |  |              |        +- ElvisExpression[]
   |  |                                                           |  |              |           +- InfixFunctionCall[]
   |  |                                                           |  |              |              +- RangeExpression[]
   |  |                                                           |  |              |                 +- AdditiveExpression[]
   |  |                                                           |  |              |                    +- MultiplicativeExpression[]
   |  |                                                           |  |              |                       +- AsExpression[]
   |  |                                                           |  |              |                          +- PrefixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |                                                           |  |              |                             +- PostfixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |                                                           |  |              |                                +- PrimaryExpression[@Identifier = "x"]
   |  |                                                           |  |              |                                   +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |                                                           |  |              |                                      +- T-Identifier[@Text = "x"]
   |  |                                                           |  |              +- EqualityOperator[]
   |  |                                                           |  |              |  +- T-EQEQ[@Text = "=="]
   |  |                                                           |  |              +- Comparison[]
   |  |                                                           |  |                 +- GenericCallLikeComparison[]
   |  |                                                           |  |                    +- InfixOperation[]
   |  |                                                           |  |                       +- ElvisExpression[]
   |  |                                                           |  |                          +- InfixFunctionCall[]
   |  |                                                           |  |                             +- RangeExpression[]
   |  |                                                           |  |                                +- AdditiveExpression[]
   |  |                                                           |  |                                   +- MultiplicativeExpression[]
   |  |                                                           |  |                                      +- AsExpression[]
   |  |                                                           |  |                                         +- PrefixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |                                                           |  |                                            +- PostfixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |                                                           |  |                                               +- PrimaryExpression[@Identifier = "y"]
   |  |                                                           |  |                                                  +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |                                                           |  |                                                     +- T-Identifier[@Text = "y"]
   |  |                                                           |  +- T-ARROW[@Text = "->"]
   |  |                                                           |  +- ControlStructureBody[]
   |  |                                                           |  |  +- Statement[]
   |  |                                                           |  |     +- Expression[]
   |  |                                                           |  |        +- Disjunction[]
   |  |                                                           |  |           +- Conjunction[]
   |  |                                                           |  |              +- Equality[]
   |  |                                                           |  |                 +- Comparison[]
   |  |                                                           |  |                    +- GenericCallLikeComparison[]
   |  |                                                           |  |                       +- InfixOperation[]
   |  |                                                           |  |                          +- ElvisExpression[]
   |  |                                                           |  |                             +- InfixFunctionCall[]
   |  |                                                           |  |                                +- RangeExpression[]
   |  |                                                           |  |                                   +- AdditiveExpression[]

   |  |                                                           |  |                                                  +- PrimaryExpression[]
   |  |                                                           |  |                                                     +- LiteralConstant[]
   |  |                                                           |  |                                                        +- T-BooleanLiteral[@Text = "true"]

   |  |                                                           |     +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   |  |                                                           +- WhenEntry[]
   |  |                                                           |  +- T-ELSE[@Text = "else"]
   |  |                                                           |  +- T-ARROW[@Text = "->"]

   +- TopLevelObject[]
   |  +- Declaration[]
   |  |  +- FunctionDeclaration[@Identifier = "whenAssign", @ReturnTypeName = "kotlin.Boolean"]
   |  |     +- T-FUN[@Text = "fun"]
   |  |     +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |     |  +- T-Identifier[@Text = "whenAssign"]

   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                     +- Expression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                     |  +- Disjunction[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                     |     +- Conjunction[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                     |        +- Equality[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                     |           +- Comparison[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                     |              +- GenericCallLikeComparison[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                     |                 +- InfixOperation[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                     |                    +- ElvisExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                     |                       +- InfixFunctionCall[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                     |                          +- RangeExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                     |                             +- AdditiveExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                     |                                +- MultiplicativeExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                     |                                   +- AsExpression[]

   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                     |                                         +- PostfixUnaryExpression[]

   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                     |                                                  +- T-Identifier[@Text = "y"]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                     +- T-RPAREN[@Text = ")"]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                     +- ControlStructureBody[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        +- Block[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           +- T-LCURL[@Text = "{"]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           +- Statements[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  +- Statement[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |  +- Expression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |     +- Disjunction[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |        +- Conjunction[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |           +- Equality[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |              +- Comparison[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                 +- GenericCallLikeComparison[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                    +- InfixOperation[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                       +- ElvisExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                          +- InfixFunctionCall[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                             +- RangeExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                +- AdditiveExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                   +- MultiplicativeExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                      +- AsExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                         +- PrefixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                            +- PostfixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                               +- PrimaryExpression[@Identifier = "println"]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                               |  +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                               |     +- T-Identifier[@Text = "println"]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                               +- PostfixUnarySuffix[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                  +- CallSuffix[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                     +- ValueArguments[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        +- T-LPAREN[@Text = "("]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        +- ValueArgument[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        |  +- Expression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        |     +- Disjunction[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        |        +- Conjunction[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        |           +- Equality[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        |              +- Comparison[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        |                 +- GenericCallLikeComparison[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        |                    +- InfixOperation[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        |                       +- ElvisExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        |                          +- InfixFunctionCall[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        |                             +- RangeExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        |                                +- AdditiveExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        |                                   +- MultiplicativeExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        |                                      +- AsExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        |                                         +- PrefixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        |                                            +- PostfixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        |                                               +- PrimaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        |                                                  +- StringLiteral[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        |                                                     +- LineStringLiteral[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        |                                                        +- T-QUOTE_OPEN[@Text = "\""]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        |                                                        +- LineStringContent[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        |                                                        |  +- T-LineStrText[@Text = "both"]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        |                                                        +- T-QUOTE_CLOSE[@Text = "\""]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  |                                                        +- T-RPAREN[@Text = ")"]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |  +- Semis[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           |     +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  |                                                           +- T-RCURL[@Text = "}"]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |  +- Semis[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           |     +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   |  |           |  |                                                           +- T-RCURL[@Text = "}"]
   |  |           |  +- Semis[]
   |  |           |     +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   |  |           +- T-RCURL[@Text = "}"]
   |  +- Semis[]
   |     +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   |     +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   |     +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   +- TopLevelObject[]
   |  +- Declaration[]
   |  |  +- FunctionDeclaration[@Identifier = "withoutBraces", @ReturnTypeName = "kotlin.Unit"]
   |  |     +- T-FUN[@Text = "fun"]
   |  |     +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |     |  +- T-Identifier[@Text = "withoutBraces"]
   |  |     +- FunctionValueParameters[]
   |  |     |  +- T-LPAREN[@Text = "("]
   |  |     |  +- FunctionValueParameter[@TypeName = "kotlin.Boolean"]
   |  |     |  |  +- Parameter[@Identifier = "x"]
   |  |     |  |     +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |     |  |     |  +- T-Identifier[@Text = "x"]
   |  |     |  |     +- T-COLON[@Text = ":"]
   |  |     |  |     +- Type[]
   |  |     |  |        +- TypeReference[]
   |  |     |  |           +- UserType[]
   |  |     |  |              +- SimpleUserType[@Identifier = "Boolean"]
   |  |     |  |                 +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |     |  |                    +- T-Identifier[@Text = "Boolean"]
   |  |     |  +- T-COMMA[@Text = ","]
   |  |     |  +- FunctionValueParameter[@TypeName = "kotlin.Boolean"]
   |  |     |  |  +- Parameter[@Identifier = "y"]
   |  |     |  |     +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |     |  |     |  +- T-Identifier[@Text = "y"]
   |  |     |  |     +- T-COLON[@Text = ":"]
   |  |     |  |     +- Type[]
   |  |     |  |        +- TypeReference[]
   |  |     |  |           +- UserType[]
   |  |     |  |              +- SimpleUserType[@Identifier = "Boolean"]
   |  |     |  |                 +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |     |  |                    +- T-Identifier[@Text = "Boolean"]
   |  |     |  +- T-RPAREN[@Text = ")"]
   |  |     +- FunctionBody[]
   |  |        +- Block[]
   |  |           +- T-LCURL[@Text = "{"]
   |  |           +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   |  |           +- Statements[]
   |  |           |  +- Statement[]
   |  |           |  |  +- Expression[]
   |  |           |  |     +- Disjunction[]
   |  |           |  |        +- Conjunction[]
   |  |           |  |           +- Equality[]
   |  |           |  |              +- Comparison[]
   |  |           |  |                 +- GenericCallLikeComparison[]
   |  |           |  |                    +- InfixOperation[]
   |  |           |  |                       +- ElvisExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                          +- InfixFunctionCall[]
   |  |           |  |                             +- RangeExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                +- AdditiveExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                   +- MultiplicativeExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                      +- AsExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                         +- PrefixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                            +- PostfixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                               +- PrimaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                  +- IfExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                     +- T-IF[@Text = "if"]
   |  |           |  |                                                     +- T-LPAREN[@Text = "("]
   |  |           |  |                                                     +- Expression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                     |  +- Disjunction[]
   |  |           |  |                                                     |     +- Conjunction[]
   |  |           |  |                                                     |        +- Equality[]
   |  |           |  |                                                     |           +- Comparison[]
   |  |           |  |                                                     |              +- GenericCallLikeComparison[]
   |  |           |  |                                                     |                 +- InfixOperation[]
   |  |           |  |                                                     |                    +- ElvisExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                     |                       +- InfixFunctionCall[]
   |  |           |  |                                                     |                          +- RangeExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                     |                             +- AdditiveExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                     |                                +- MultiplicativeExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                     |                                   +- AsExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                     |                                      +- PrefixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                     |                                         +- PostfixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                     |                                            +- PrimaryExpression[@Identifier = "x"]
   |  |           |  |                                                     |                                               +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |           |  |                                                     |                                                  +- T-Identifier[@Text = "x"]
   |  |           |  |                                                     +- T-RPAREN[@Text = ")"]
   |  |           |  |                                                     +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   |  |           |  |                                                     +- ControlStructureBody[]
   |  |           |  |                                                        +- Statement[]
   |  |           |  |                                                           +- Expression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                              +- Disjunction[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                 +- Conjunction[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                    +- Equality[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                       +- Comparison[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                          +- GenericCallLikeComparison[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                             +- InfixOperation[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                +- ElvisExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                   +- InfixFunctionCall[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                      +- RangeExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                         +- AdditiveExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                            +- MultiplicativeExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                               +- AsExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                  +- PrefixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                     +- PostfixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                        +- PrimaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                           +- IfExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                              +- T-IF[@Text = "if"]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                              +- T-LPAREN[@Text = "("]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                              +- Expression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                              |  +- Disjunction[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                              |     +- Conjunction[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                              |        +- Equality[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                              |           +- Comparison[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                              |              +- GenericCallLikeComparison[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                              |                 +- InfixOperation[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                              |                    +- ElvisExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                              |                       +- InfixFunctionCall[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                              |                          +- RangeExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                              |                             +- AdditiveExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                              |                                +- MultiplicativeExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                              |                                   +- AsExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                              |                                      +- PrefixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                              |                                         +- PostfixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                              |                                            +- PrimaryExpression[@Identifier = "y"]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                              |                                               +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                              |                                                  +- T-Identifier[@Text = "y"]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                              +- T-RPAREN[@Text = ")"]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                              +- ControlStructureBody[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                 +- Statement[]

   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                       +- Disjunction[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                          +- Conjunction[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                             +- Equality[]

   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                         +- ElvisExpression[]

   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                     +- MultiplicativeExpression[]

   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                           +- PrefixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                              +- PostfixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                 +- PrimaryExpression[@Identifier = "println"]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                 |  +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                 |     +- T-Identifier[@Text = "println"]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                 +- PostfixUnarySuffix[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                    +- CallSuffix[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                       +- ValueArguments[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          +- T-LPAREN[@Text = "("]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          +- ValueArgument[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |  +- Expression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |     +- Disjunction[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |        +- Conjunction[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |           +- Equality[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |              +- Comparison[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                 +- GenericCallLikeComparison[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                    +- InfixOperation[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                       +- ElvisExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                          +- InfixFunctionCall[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                             +- RangeExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                +- AdditiveExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                   +- MultiplicativeExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                      +- AsExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                         +- PrefixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                            +- PostfixUnaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                               +- PrimaryExpression[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                  +- StringLiteral[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                     +- LineStringLiteral[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                        +- T-QUOTE_OPEN[@Text = "\""]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                        +- LineStringContent[]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                        |  +- T-LineStrText[@Text = "ok"]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          |                                                        +- T-QUOTE_CLOSE[@Text = "\""]
   |  |           |  |                                                                                                                                                                          +- T-RPAREN[@Text = ")"]
   |  |           |  +- Semis[]
   |  |           |     +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   |  |           +- T-RCURL[@Text = "}"]
   |  +- Semis[]
   |     +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   +- EOF[@Text = "<EOF>"]
